import ModelS from '../../assets/img/model-s.jpg'

export const data = [
    {
        title:'Model 3' ,
        background:{ModelS} ,
        plaid:true,
        range:'405' ,
        mph:'2.03' ,
        speed:'175',
        peak:'1,220',
    },
    {
        title:'Model S' ,
        background:{ModelS} ,
        plaid:false,
        range:'396' ,
        mph:'1.99' ,
        speed:'300',
        peak:'1,021',
    },
    {
        title:'Model Y' ,
        background:{ModelS} ,
        plaid:true,
        range:'296' ,
        mph:'0.99' ,
        speed:'300',
        peak:'1,020',
    },
    {
        title:'Model X' ,
        background:{ModelS} ,
        plaid:false,
        range:'500' ,
        mph:'1.99' ,
        speed:'400',
        peak:'2,020',
    }
]
